creator: chris@epler.net
text:
I too am experiencing this on a SuperMicro server chassis using IPMI to 
remotely mount an ISO image (The IPMI interface uses USB to interface 
for drive mounts, keyboard and mouse)  I found that using a FreeBSD-8 
boot only CD worked however: 8.0-CURRENT-200803-i386-bootonly.iso - I 
found this while searching Google, not sure the exact location.  Booting 
that CD then changing the distribution to install FreeBSD7-Release 
allowed me to install properly.  I hope this gets addressed soon!
